deals.title: Iced Toffee Hazelnut Latte
deals.itemDescription: Celebrate the season with our Toffee Hazelnut Latte — creamy vanilla–caramel topped, infused with the cozy aroma of roasted hazelnuts. This delightful flavor is achieved with artificially flavored syrup, paired with coffee beans that received the 3-Star Superior Taste Award. Each sip blends rich coffee and nutty sweetness for the perfect festive treat.

deals.title: Creme Brulee Latte
deals.itemDescription: Inspired by the classic French dessert crème brûlée, this latte blends caramelized sweetness, silky smooth milk, and award-winning dark roast coffee—delivering a velvety, indulgent experience with every sip. It achieves the iconic rich flavor of the beloved dessert using artificially flavored crème brûlée syrup.
